codeReview.summary: This fix feature properly addresses the original failure by verifying the hover-then-reroll flow for VAL-CROSS-006. The worker correctly identified that the functionality was already implemented (group-hover:scale-[1.02] with duration-500 ease-out transition on App.tsx line 314, reroll-pulse animation in index.css) and performed thorough agent-browser testing to verify the flow: hover over album cover triggers scale effect, move mouse away restores normal scale, click reroll initiates clean transition with loading animation. No code changes needed - this was a verification fix for the original incomplete verification.

summary: PASS: The fix feature successfully addresses the original failure. Original issue: cross-flow-interactions worker failed to verify the hover-then-reroll flow (VAL-CROSS-006). This fix worker properly performed the verification: (1) Confirmed the hover implementation exists in App.tsx line 314 with group-hover:scale-[1.02] class and duration-500 ease-out transition, (2) Used agent-browser to hover over album cover and observe scale effect, (3) Moved mouse away and verified scale returns to normal, (4) Clicked reroll button and observed clean transition with loading animation, (5) Verified no console errors or page errors during the entire sequence. Commit bc5a6df is documentation-only (scrutiny synthesis), which is correct since this was a verification fix, not an implementation change. All expected behaviors for VAL-CROSS-006 are now verified.
